meaning: n.不严格遵守形式的赋格曲
examples: Caril Fugate lived in Lincoln, Nebraska, and in 1956, she started dating Charles Starkweather (five years her senior).
Federal Emergency Management Agency Administrator Craig Fugate said people shouldn't wait for the next forecast to act.
Fugate warned that even if Irene decreases in intensity it could still cause significant disruption and damage to property.
W. Craig Fugate, Administrator, Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), Department of Homeland Security, named James N.
W. Craig Fugate, Administrator, Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), Department of Homeland Security, named Gracia B.
